LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAR-20-2023 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES" IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $800. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Attorney Fees And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Mar-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Attorney Fees.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for attorney fees" is granted in the amount of $800.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
